title: taraxacum deltoideum
intro: Taraxacum deltoideum, also known as the broad-leaved hawk's beard or delta-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum deltoideum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Taraxacum deltoideum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
